description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat green roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low perimeter wall. The front yard features a driveway with a parked car and landscaped greenery, while the rear includes a patio area with a swimming pool and outdoor seating. Large windows dominate both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light gray and black, creating a striking contrast with the green roof. The house is set within a walled lot, with a main entry gate at the front and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and functional urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat green roof, large windows, a front driveway, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entry gate, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat green roof, side yard with plants, and the full length of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green roof, side yard, and the rear pool area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, paved walkway, and a low wall with a gate; minimal decorative elements.
